# System Requirements Document

## User Interface

### REQ-UI-001: Dark Mode Support
- Status: Approved
- Priority: Medium
- Type: Functional
- Source: CR-42

The application SHALL provide a dark mode theme.

### REQ-UI-002: Keyboard Navigation
- Status: Draft
- Priority: Low
- Type: Accessibility

All interactive elements SHALL be operable via keyboard alone.

## Performance

### REQ-PERF-001: Application Startup Time
- Status: Draft
- Priority: High
- Type: Performance

The application SHALL reach interactive state within 2 seconds of launch.
